channel.title: Digital Campus - Release Notes
channel.description: Technology products managed by the Digital Campus team

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we are releasing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1803 to the Canary Channel. (KB 5083824) What’s new in Canary Build 28020.1803 Changes and Improvements g The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1803 (Canary Channel) appeared first on Windows...

Windows

Windows

Changes in Dev Channel builds and updates are documented in two buckets: new features, and improvements (inc The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26300.8155...

Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we are releasing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26220.8148 (KB 5083825) to the Beta Channel. Changes in Beta Channel builds and updates are documented in two buckets: new features, and improvements (i The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26220.8148...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - UPDATE: Updates to How Table Gadget Data is Returned Via API (now scheduled for April 19, 2026)
item.description:
Kuali Build

We’re postponing updates to how Table gadget data is formatted in API JSON responses (see the original announcement for details). To allow a...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Meet is now available on CarPlay
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re excited to announce Google Meet for Apple CarPlay, allowing on-the-go professionals to stay connected hands-free and join meetings safely while on the road.With this update, users can now access Google Meet directly from their car's dashboard. This feature is designed to provide a seamless...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Export Google Vids directly to YouTube
item.description:
Google Workspace

You can now publish the videos you create in Google Vids directly to YouTube. This saves you a few steps - previously you would export the project as an MP4 file, then go to YouTube to upload the file.Whether you are creating marketing videos, training materials, or educational content, this...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Record your screen directly from Chrome with the Google Vids Screen Recorder Chrome Extension
item.description:
Google Workspace

You can now quickly record your screen from any browser window using the new Google Vids Screen Recorder Chrome extension. Instead of having to open Google Vids to access recording functionality, you can now initiate a recording with a single click right from the Chrome extensions toolbar.This is...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Direct an avatar to speak and act anywhere with a consistent face and voice
item.description:
Google Workspace

AI Avatars in Google Vids can deliver your message with a consistent face and voice throughout a video, and they are preferred 5x more often than those on other platforms.Today we’re excited to announce you can now place avatars in different scenes and have them interact with objects you specify,...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Create and refine custom avatars in Google Vids
item.description:
Google Workspace

AI Avatars in Google Vids provide high-quality speakers preferred five times more often than those on other platforms. Now you can customize and refine these avatars to match your brand and message, with Nano Banana 2.Why use custom avatars?Unique Branding: Build an exclusive look that represents...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Phone API endpoint deprecations
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: breaking-change, deprecation | Zoom deprecated several endpoints for phone numbers, plans, cloud peering, SMS campaigns, and related settings. Use the new Number Management APIs for enhanced, streamlined management. Migrate by **June 30, 2026**. We will not support deprecated endpoints after...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 1.0.4
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: bug-fix, sdk-version | New diagnostic tools for screen sharing and camera troubleshooting, including APIs to detect environment issues, permission errors, and black screens, with real-time progress updates and privacy safeguards. New error codes, expanded test coverage, refactored user-agent...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New session AI interpreter usage summary webhook
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New session AI interpreter usage summary webhook.

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - Coming Soon: Updates to How Table Gadget Data is Returned Via API
item.description:
Kuali Build

We wanted to make you aware of forthcoming changes to how our Table gadget data is formatted in JSON when returned via the API. If you have ...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Upcoming change to default setting for downloading Google Meet recordings
item.description:
Google Workspace

Currently, Google Meet video recordings do not allow viewers to download or copy them by default unless the recording owner explicitly allows it. As a result, the "Ask Gemini" functionality within the Drive viewer is also disabled by default for viewers who aren’t file owners.Starting April 30,...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Form creation with Gemini and more now available in more languages
item.description:
Google Workspace

Last year, we announced Help me create in Google Forms and then expanded access to the feature to seven more languages.Help me create in Google Forms drafts your questions 3x faster than doing it manually.*Now, this feature is also available to users in 21 more languages including Arabic, Catalan,...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Generate beautiful and editable slides with ease in Google Slides
item.description:
Google Workspace

Slide generation just got a major upgrade. Gemini can now create fully editable, brand-matched slides using dynamic layouts tailored to your specific content. To ensure visual consistency, Gemini securely analyzes your existing deck to generate designs that fit your established style. You can also...

View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Gain Better IT Asset Control and Visibility into Software Licensing With NinjaOne 13.0
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 13.0 release advances IT asset management (ITAM) capabilities with software license improvements that offer greater cost visibility, usage history for custom licenses, and refined control over permissions and assignments. The platform now includes robust Lost Mode support for managed...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - An update on secondary calendar lifecycle changes and a new API
item.description:
Google Workspace

We recently announced a change to the ownership model of secondary calendars to improve data governance. As part of this, we emailed impacted customers to let them know that orphan secondary calendars would be deleted starting on April 27, 2026.Since that announcement, we’ve received valuable...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Download the third-party attestation for data regions
item.description:
Google Workspace

Beginning today, admins have access to an independent review of Google Workspace’s data regions, not only for their compliance needs but also for their peace of mind.This external evaluation from Coalfire, a third-party assessment organization, gives Assured Controls customers the confidence that...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Ransomware detection and file restoration for Google Drive now generally available
item.description:
Google Workspace

In September 2025, we launched ransomware detection and file restoration in beta to help organizations minimize the impact of malware attacks on personal computers. Today, we’re excited to share these two features are generally available with significant improvements in malware detection.Compared...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Introducing guest accounts: Collaborate securely and communicate with non-Workspace users in Google Chat
item.description:
Google Workspace

Today, we're excited to announce the general availability of guest accounts in Google Workspace. Guest accounts empower organizations to securely collaborate with customers, partners, and vendors that are not on Google Workspace. More than secure, real-time messaging in Google Chat, guest accounts...

View release notes →

macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - PKCE is now generally available!
item.description:
Slack

We are excited to announce support for Proof Key for Code Exchange (PKCE). PKCE is an OAuth security extension that enables developers to build more secure Slack applications on public clients, such as desktop apps and mobile apps, without the need to embed a vulnerable client_secret.

View release notes →

item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added rc_response field for Dashboards quality of service API endpoints.

View release notes →

item.description:
Zoom

Tags: bug-fix, new-feature, sdk-version | Added Hindi localization support; add support for toggling consumer cameras off or on; add support for left-right split screen in landscape orientation; upgrade Android version.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 5.3.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: bug-fix, new-feature, sdk-version | Added Hindi localization support; add support for toggling consumer cameras off or on; add support for left-right split screen in landscape orientation.

View release notes →

item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new Export API.

item.title: Zoom - RTMS March release
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: new-feature | Add RTMS integration with Zoom Contact Center, a reorganized audio parameters matrix, single individual video stream subscription, stream closure requests, and media-socket timeout extension.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.0.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: new-feature, sdk-version | This initial Android ZRCSDK release introduces the first public SDK surface for Zoom Rooms, including SDK initialization, room pairing, pre-meeting workflows, meeting lifecycle, audio/video/sharing controls, participant management, recording, reminders, and room...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Assets APIs⁠(opens in a new tab or window) now return an additional metadata property as part of the asset object.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design export job API now supports two additional email export formats: html_bundle and html_standalone. Use these formats when creating e
item.description:
Canva

The Create design export job API now supports two additional email export formats: html_bundle and html_standalone. Use these formats when creating export jobs for email designs, depending on whether you need bundled assets (html_bundle) or a standalone HTML output (html_standalone).

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now supports column_configs for chart data fields, allowing you to define column names and data types separately f
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now supports column_configs for chart data fields, allowing you to define column names and data types separately from your data.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't
item.description:
Canva

A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't provided in a request, the request type will be assumed to be type_and_asset.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - March 27, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Safeguarded guest admit flow in Google MeetThe new safeguarded guest admit flow assists hosts in meetings when they respond to users who ask to join meetings (also known as ”knocking”). This makes it easier for hosts to handle large volumes of requests and helps reduce the attention and time...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Optional scopes have landed
item.description:
Slack

You can now mark individual OAuth scopes as optional when configuring your Slack app! Optional scopes give users more control over what data your app can access during installation, without blocking them from installing your app entirely.

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Set status method scope update
item.description:
Slack

The assistant.threads.setStatus API method now accepts either the assistantwrite scope. This allows channel-based apps to use AI loading states in channels, without having to request assistantwrite scope in favor of the chat:write scope exclusively, so update your app soon!

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Release Notes 4.02
item.description:
ClickUp

Update Task Types in Views, Pin AI Notetaker, and more! This week’s release unlocks the ability to manage Task Types in Views, add date ranges to Gantt view exports, and so much more. Update Task Type Column in Your Views: Quickly see and update task types directly from your List and Table views....

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Weekly Recap - 02.13.2026
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Enhanced Proof of Play (POP) with **Hourly Reporting**, giving all customers more granular visibility into content performance throughout the day. - Improved Proof of Play to ensure reporting data...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Booking V9.7.1
item.description:
Korbyt

# What’s New? ## Deep Link to Locate Colleague on Floorplan (Bookit) Implemented a deep link capability in Bookit that enables authenticated users to directly locate a colleague’s booked space on the floorplan via a URL and book near them. ### Key Functionality **Hyperlink Integration** • The...

View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Unify IT Service, Assets, and Operations With NinjaOne 12.0
item.description:
NinjaOne

Release Schedule: January 27 – February 25 NinjaOne’s 12.0 release has arrived to improve how IT teams manage assets, integrate service delivery with business operations, gain insights into profitability and health status, and proactively resolve any recovery issues. MSPs can now sync service...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Super Agents: Release Notes Takeover
item.description:
ClickUp

Super Agents: The world's first human-like AI AgentsSuper Agents™ are personalized AI teammates that understand your work, use powerful tools, and collaborate like humans. Just describe the problem you want solved, the workflow you want to automate, or where you’re wasting time, and Super Agents...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - ⚡ Join us for a Super Agents AMA on Reddit!
item.description:
ClickUp

Hey, everyone!We’re excited to announce a special Reddit AMA (Ask Me Anything) with the ClickUp AI Team, all about our latest feature: Super Agents!🗓️ When: Thursday, January 22nd, 10am–12pm PST📍 Where: the r/ClickUp subreddit on RedditThis is your opportunity to connect directly with Michael Van...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Product Recap - 01.12.2026
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to over the break and last week week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - **Secrets API: Credential Management** — IT Admins can now securely manage the lifecycle of API credentials using a centralized Secrets API. This includes creating, listing,...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Introducing Super Agents™: The world’s first human-like AI agents
item.description:
ClickUp

Today, we’re launching ClickUp Super Agents – the first human‑like AI agents that live inside ClickUp and collaborate with your team like real teammates.These aren’t just chatbots or one‑off automations. Super Agents:See your work the way you do: tasks, docs, chats, meetings, and schedules all in...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - 4.0 Release Notes Takeover
item.description:
ClickUp

4.0: A New Era of Craft, Quality, and ConvergenceA new era starts today. ClickUp 4.0 is crafted from the ground up for perfect human productivity - Projects, Databases, Scheduling, Chats, DMs, Video Calls. And context is maximized, perfect for AI Agents' productivity. ✨ Effortless Navigation,...

View release notes →

item.description:
